metadata.title: Zero Waste Life - Eco Gamification Platform
metadata.description: Join the movement to clean our planet. Earn rewards for recycling and eco-friendly actions.

hero.title: Clean the Planet,
hero.subtitle: Join thousands of eco-warriors making a difference. Scan trash, earn points, redeem rewards.

features.title: How It Works
features.subtitle: Three simple steps to make an impact

scan.title: Scan Trash
scan.description: Take a photo of trash using our AI-powered scanner

earn.title: Earn Points
earn.description: Get rewarded for every verified eco-action

redeem.title: Redeem Rewards
redeem.description: Exchange points for eco-friendly products and discounts

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Our mission is to make the world cleaner through gamification

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: We believe that small actions, when multiplied by millions, can transform the world.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: A world where every piece of trash is properly recycled and every person is an eco-warrior.

values.title: Our Values
values.description: Transparency, community and measurable impact guide everything we build.

scanner.title: Trash Scanner
scanner.subtitle: Take a photo to identify and classify waste

map.title: Eco Map
map.subtitle: Find recycling centers and reported trash locations
